# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Artist Benefit Check

How does this change increase creator sovereignty, clarity, or reliability?

## Hygiene Checklist

- [ ] No generated artifact paths changed (`.venv/`, `dist/`, `node_modules/`)
- [ ] `npm run hygiene:check` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] Design law constraints respected (Comfortaa whitelist, identity tokens)
- [ ] Any deferred risk is explicitly documented
